tagline: Systems essays, political machinery, speculative fiction, and working notes.
author: Matt Faherty
description: Matt Faherty's publishing lab for writing about the machinery underneath things: capitalism, power, religion, governance, technology, injury, survival, and the institutions people keep pretending are natural.
about_description: Matt Faherty writes about systems, power, institutions, political machinery, and the human consequences of structures people are taught to treat as natural.
